patch.value: SDK describeExtensionActivation: single-call introspection of every registered surface (complements assert*/run*)

Add a describe/introspection verb to the SDK testing surface. ExtensionActivationResult already exposes per-surface COUNTS (hook_counts, registration_counts, *_count) but no single API enumerating WHAT was registered by name: a package author or agent must walk all 15+ sub-registries (registrations.commands/flags/item_types/item_fields/migrations/importers/exporters/search_providers/vector_store_adapters, commands.overrides/handlers, parsers/preflight/services/renderers.overrides, hooks.before/after/onWrite/onRead/onIndex) by hand to answer 'what does this extension register?'. describeExtensionActivation(activation, {extensionName?}) returns a flat, sorted, deterministic ExtensionActivationSummary of every surface's identifiers (command paths, hook kinds, item-type/field names, migration ids, importer/exporter/provider/adapter names, overridden service names + renderer formats, flag target-commands, preflight override count) plus the capabilities exercised (reusing collectUsedExtensionCapabilities). Value: (1) agents get one token-efficient call instead of traversing every sub-registry; (2) authors can assert their WHOLE registration surface in one deepEqual ('I register exactly these surfaces, nothing more' = a least-privilege check). Completes the author(define*) -> register(api.register*) -> verify-one(assert*) -> invoke-one(run*) -> enumerate-all(describe) ergonomics. New src/core/extensions/activation-summary.ts, re-exported via @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk and /sdk/testing, 100% line+branch+docstring coverage, documented in docs/SDK.md.

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Implemented src/core/extensions/activation-summary.ts: describeExtensionActivation(activation, {extensionName?}) -> ExtensionActivationSummary. Pure function, walks every sub-registry the loader populates (same surfaces capability-usage attributes), returns flat sorted/deduped identifier arrays for all 16 surfaces + capabilities (reusing collectUsedExtensionCapabilities). Re-exported from sdk/index.ts barrel AND sdk/testing.ts subpath (barrel identity locked via toBe in the spec). KEY findings: (1) registerMigration allows id-less migrations -> migrations field uses a narrowing flatMap (cast-free, the empty-array branch is reachable+covered); (2) importer/exporter command paths land in commands.handlers but NOT registrations.commands unless command-metadata options are passed -> commands vs command_handlers genuinely differ, documented in interface JSDoc + test. 7 new tests in tests/unit/core/extensions/activation-summary.spec.ts (full-surface, flag dedup, union+filter, no-match-empty, id-less migration, empty activation, barrel identity). 100% line/branch/func/stmt on the module. Documented in docs/SDK.md (Testing Helpers prose + Public Exports + Common types). Full suite: 4850 tests green, 100/100/100/100 coverage. Manual temp-dir verify: real package imported describeExtensionActivation from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing, activated, got full surface + filter in one call.

patch.value: Added src/core/extensions/activation-summary.ts exporting describeExtensionActivation(activation,{extensionName?}):ExtensionActivationSummary — a pure function that walks every activation sub-registry once and returns a flat, de-duplicated, locale-sorted (hooks in canonical lifecycle order) enumeration of all 16 registered-surface identifiers (commands/command_overrides/command_handlers, hooks, flag_commands, item_types/item_fields, migrations, importers/exporters, search_providers/vector_store_adapters, parser_overrides, service_overrides, renderer_overrides, preflight_overrides count) plus the exercised capabilities (reusing collectUsedExtensionCapabilities). Re-exported from the @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk barrel and the /sdk/testing subpath (barrel identity locked via toBe). Shares normalizeExtensionName (now exported from capability-usage.ts) on both filter sides so named surfaces and capabilities never disagree for a whitespace-padded stored name. Completes the author(define*)->register(api.register*)->verify-one(assertRegistered*)->invoke-one(runRegistered*ForTest)->enumerate-all(describe) ergonomics for the extension platform.

Package authors and agents get the entire registration surface of an activation in one token-efficient call (a single deepEqual for least-privilege 'registers exactly these surfaces' checks) instead of walking 15+ sub-registries; the helper ships on @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk and /sdk/testing at 100% coverage with the build/typecheck clean.

Merged PR #343 (squash bf36f80d). Full suite 4850->4858 tests green at 100/100/100/100 coverage; tsc (src+packages) clean; static + docs-skills gates green; dist/sdk/{index,testing}.d.ts declare the helper. Bots: Gemini clean (no feedback), CodeRabbit [approve] (all 5 polish items resolved across 3 rounds — flag-union test, fifteen-plus wording, hooks-order doc accuracy, .trim() consistency declined+restructured to shared normalizeExtensionName, preflight_overrides numeric-field doc), Sourcery rate-limited, Codex not connected. Verified end-to-end in a temp dir: a real package imported describeExtensionActivation from @unbrained/pm-cli/sdk/testing, activated, and got the full surface + extensionName filter in one call.

Delivered describeExtensionActivation: single-call introspection of every registered extension surface, completing the SDK author->register->assert->run->describe ergonomics. New core module re-exported via both SDK subpaths, 100% coverage, documented in SDK.md. Part of epic pm-ugqx; rationale shares ADR pm-3mph.
